steps.title: Use a graph point
steps.content: From the graph, the line crosses the $y$-axis at $(0,2)$. Substitute this point into the equation $10x+By=50$.

steps.title: Find the coefficient
steps.content: Using $(0,2)$ gives an equation with only $B$ left to solve: $$10(0)+B(2)=50$$ $$2B=50$$ $$B=25$$ The answer is A.
